name: Amaretto Chocolate Fudge Pie
recipeIngredient: 30 amaretti -- crushed (Italian almond macaroons available at specialty food shops and some supermarkets)
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, melt 1 ounce of chocolate with 6 tablespoons butter and let cool.
2. In a 9 x 3 inch springform pan, combine 2 tablespoons sugar with the crushed amaretti. Stir in the chocolate mixture and combine well.
3. Press the crumb mixture onto the bottom and one-third up the side of the pan. Chill the crust.
4. In the top of a double boiler, melt remaining 3 ounces chocolate with remaining 8 tablespoons butter and let cool.
5. In a bowl with an electric mixer, beat eggs and salt. Add remaining 2 cups sugar gradually, beating until thick and pale.
6. Beat in corn syrup, heavy cream, vanilla, almond extract, and chocolate mixture. Pour filling into crust.
7. Bake in the center of a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes. Let cool on a rack.
8. Run knife around edge of pan, remove side, and serve with whipped cream.
